exploration_notes: The GDScript VM security boundary spans two main areas. (1) The bytecode interpreter lives in gdscript_vm.cpp with GDScriptFunction::call() implementing the opcode dispatch loop (using computed-goto OPCODE_SWITCH macro). GDScriptFunction is declared in gdscript_function.h with call-frame/stack management (_stack_size, etc.). The byte-code generator (gdscript_byte_codegen.h/cpp) emits the opcodes the VM executes. (2) The Object method dispatch chain: Object::callp() in core/object/object.cpp firs
